mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT u.*, r.name as roleName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')
AND u.enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
